cards.back: A sequence of numbers used to sample from a target distribution
Numbers generated from a normal distribution, often used as proposal distributions
A phrase used to describe the uncertainty in MCMC methods, where the method may not converge to the target distribution
A distribution used to propose new samples in MCMC, often chosen to be simple and easy to sample from
A sequence of random states, where the next state depends only on the current state and the transition probabilities
